case_title: JONATHAN J WIESNER VS. JACQUES JANOT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-14-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-14-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
